items.name: Snow Storm Cloud
items.description: Clicking on a humanoid of any kind (yep, works on NPCs) will cause a cloud to rush from your hand to your target. It will hover above them, spin and occasionally drop snowflakes.

items.name: Silver Crown of Savants 2026
items.description:
You're truly a force to be reckoned with! Earn this crown by placing Between 4th and 10th on the leaderboards during NPC Champions Challenge 2026!
Owning this item will give you the NPC Champions Silver 26' gun. Be sure to have your inventory public to use!

items.name: Bronze Crown of Brilliance 2026
items.description:
You're a formidable opponent! Earn this crown by placing 11th to 25th on the leaderboards during NPC Champions Challenge 2026!
Owning this item will give you the NPC Champions Bronze 26' gun. Be sure to have your inventory public to use!

items.name: Golden Crown of Champions 2026
items.description:
You're the best of the best! Earn this crown by placing Top 3 on the leaderboards during NPC Champion's Challenge 2026!
Owning this item will give you the NPC Champions Gold 26' gun. Be sure to have your inventory public to use!
